title: Move Remaining Participant Follow-Ups Forward
support: Omari coordinates DSG Zoom only after participant replies
tool: Gmail + Google Calendar/Meet + DSG Share Folder
deliverable: Richard replies to the remaining participants or flags a coverage gap; any Zoom scheduling path is coordinated after replies; no participant PII is copied into shared Hub notes.
context: Andrew confirmed on July 16 that the refund is processing/closed from DSG's side unless an issue appears. The live work is Richard contacting the other participants and moving follow-up forward.
nextSteps: Confirm which participant threads still need Richard response or scheduling movement.
Have Richard reply or flag the coverage gap to Andrew.
Loop in Omari for DSG Zoom coordination only after participant replies require scheduling.
Record a PII-safe status note and next action in the appropriate programming record.
Reopen the refund lane only if the processor or participant reports a problem.
requiredEvidence: PII-safe note that Richard replied, delegated, or flagged the gap; scheduling status if a participant reply requires it.
verification1: Andrew confirms the participant follow-up state is accurately reflected.
verification2: Andrew or the delegated program owner confirms whether any remaining participant-care item should stay open.
cockpitBacklink: Action Tracker task-participant-stan-farah-zoom-followup; Source Inbox July 16 participant thread rows
prompt: In DSG GPT, create a PII-safe participant follow-up tracker for the remaining July workshop follow-ups. Include owner, next response needed, Zoom coordination rule, what not to put in shared notes, required evidence, Verification 1, Verification 2, and Cockpit backlink.

Document whether Google approves, asks for more information, or names a remaining website gap.
If a website gap remains, draft the smallest source-backed repair for Andrew review.
Do not resubmit, change accounts, publish claims, or edit the site without approval.

verification2: Andrew approves closure or the next website/account action.
